headline: JPMorgan resets Dell stock price target after earnings
summary: Two weeks ago, JPMorgan raised its Dell price target to $280 and called it a meaningful move. After Dell's latest earnings, that target lasted less than a fortnight. On May 29, the same analyst nearly doubled it again. Samik Chatterjee, a top-ranked JPMorgan analyst rated eighth among more than ...

headline: Jeff Bezos Says Bottom 50% of Americans Should Pay No Tax. The Real Culprit Is Federal Spending
summary: On a recent episode of The Pomp Podcast featuring guest Jordi Visser, host Anthony Pompliano surfaced a notable statement from Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) founder Jeff Bezos: the bottom 50% of Americans should pay no federal tax. Pompliano paired that proposal with a data point and a pivot. The data point: that bottom-half cohort currently contributes about ... Jeff Bezos Says Bottom 50% of Americans Should Pay No Tax. The Real Culprit Is Federal Spending

headline: ‘Unsurprised’: JPMorgan has been ordered to pay a fired employee $4.25 million over a Super Bowl deli platter dispute
summary: The firm claimed the $642 platter was served at a personal Super Bowl party — not a legitimate business event.

headline: Is It Time To Revisit JPMorgan Chase (JPM) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Wondering whether JPMorgan Chase at around US$299 per share still offers you value, or if most of the upside has already been priced in. The stock is down 2.3% over the past week and 3.2% over the past month, even though the 1 year return sits at 15.6% and the 3 year return is a very large 128.2%. No single headline fully explains these moves. It is useful to view the recent pullback alongside the longer term performance, including the 104.1% return over 5 years and the year to date decline...
